commit.subject: LU-9183 llite: remove struct file on stack in ll_setxattr()
commit.message:
LU-9183 llite: remove struct file on stack in ll_setxattr()

Backport upstream commit c139f3cef36291902d7a29a334acd25a1251cd9d
